metadata.description: Cortex-command plugin marketplace — interactive Claude Code skills, overnight runner integration, and opt-in extras for autonomous development workflows.

plugins.name: android-dev-extras
plugins.description: Android development skills vendored from Google's Android Skills (Apache 2.0): R8 analyzer, edge-to-edge migration, and Android CLI orchestration

plugins.description: Interactive Claude Code skills, hooks, and CLI utilities from cortex-command for day-to-day development workflows

plugins.name: cortex-overnight-integration
plugins.description: Integrates the cortex MCP server and overnight skill runner hooks to drive autonomous lifecycle execution

plugins.name: cortex-pr-review
plugins.description: Multi-agent GitHub pull request review pipeline for Claude Code

plugins.name: cortex-ui-extras
plugins.description: Experimental UI design skills for Claude Code interactive workflows
